title: Wowozela
description: A fretless instrument that changes pitch depending on your eye pitch
body:
# Wowozela

[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/refs/heads/v2/badge/64h/carnival/compact.png)](https://modfest.net/carnival)

A fantastical fretless instrument that changes pitch depending on your eye pitch, inspired by the [Wowozela](<https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=108170491>) addon from Garry's Mod!

## Crafting & Usage

You can craft your very own wowozela with 4 amethyst shards and any music disc like so.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IrWit47r/images/b93db8197f9558c6ca818e499fdae7de8deafde3.png)

You can change the active instrument by pressing the keybind `R`.
